docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHOI, HO MUN AS TO DEFENDANT MI AUTOMOBILE CLINIC, INC. LLYA, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MI AUTOMOBILE CLINIC, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOI, HO MUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MI AUTOMOBILE CLINIC, INC. LLYA, MICHAEL $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $846.00, DEFENDANT TO RETURN VEHICLE TO PLAINTIFF. THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO REFLECT DEFENDANT'S CORRECT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MI AUTOMOBILE CLINIC, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MI AUTOMOBILE CLINIC, INC.
